models.name: Credit Score Model
models.description: Evaluates creditworthiness for rural contractors, farms, and public applicants.

models.name: Farm Grant Eligibility Model
models.description: Determines eligibility for agricultural grants, subsidies, and rural assistance.

models.name: Contractor Bid Model
models.description: Calculates fair bid pricing for rural contractors based on materials, labor, and distance.

models.name: Public Assistance Model
models.description: Evaluates public assistance eligibility for rural residents.

models.name: Mission Phoenix Funding Model
models.description: Allocates operational funding from Mission Phoenix for Seven‑OS infrastructure, rescue, and rural development missions.
